findings.description: Variable name 'x' is too short and non-descriptive.
findings.suggestion: Rename 'x' to something that describes its semantic purpose.

findings.description: Potential SQL injection vulnerability. Inputs should not be concatenated directly into queries.
findings.suggestion: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements instead of string concatenation.

findings.description: O(N^2) quadratic nested loop detected over high volume collections.
findings.suggestion: Optimize the query or use a hash map lookup to reduce complexity to O(N).
